module.name: API Error Handler
module.doc:description: This module relies entirely in runtime provided components (no other Plugin dependencies)

parameter.name: badRequestError
parameter.defaultValue: #[error.description default "There was an issue with your request"]

parameter.name: unauthorizedError
parameter.defaultValue: #[error.description default "Authentication was not provided or is invalid"]

parameter.name: forbiddenError
parameter.defaultValue: #[error.description default "You are not allowed to make this request"]

parameter.name: notAcceptableError
parameter.defaultValue: #[error.description default "The API cannot provide the requested accepted response"]

parameter.name: timeoutError
parameter.defaultValue: #[error.description default "The request to the server has been timed-out"]

parameter.name: tooManyRequestsError
parameter.defaultValue: #[error.description default "You have made too many requests to the server"]

parameter.name: expressionError
parameter.defaultValue: Error with data transformation. See log for details.

parameter.name: methodNotImplementedError
parameter.defaultValue: #[error.description default "The operation has not been implemented"]

parameter.name: connectivityError
parameter.defaultValue: #[error.description default "Unable to access the system at this time"]

parameter.name: customErrorDefinition
parameter.summary: Provide the local path to the error definitions file that defines the custom errors. The file must be Dataweave format (.dwl).

mule:logger.message: #[output aplication/java --- "Current error type: " ++ (vars.errorType default "") ++ " Error Description: " ++ (vars.error.description default "")]
#["There was an issue loading the custom error types file " ++ vars.customErrorDefinition ++ ": " ++ error.description default ""]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 import mergeWith from dw::core::Objects output application/java var errorType = vars.errorType as String var defaultErrors = vars.defaultErrorTypes var customErrors = vars.customErrorTypes default {} var allErrors = defaultErrors mergeWith customErrors --- allErrors[errorType]

ee:message.ee:set-attributes: %dw 2.0 output application/java var valid = if ( (!isEmpty(vars.errorDef.status)) and (!isEmpty(vars.errorDef.reason)) ) true else false var status = if (valid) vars.errorDef.status else 500 --- { httpStatus: status as Number }

mule:logger.message: #[output application/java --- "Error HTTP Status: " ++ attributes.httpStatus default "" ++ " Error Response: " ++ write(payload, "application/json") default ""]
